name: RestrictedCompositionTarget
definition_role: records the field vocabulary of the restricted target object before any theorem rule is supplied
non_claims: does not inhabit the restricted target
does not supply a theorem rule from input contract to restricted target
does not supply a theorem rule from restricted target to ZeroDayClosure
does not erase the restricted boundary
does not prove the restricted-to-unrestricted lift
next_weakest_point: Guard this definition surface, then separately decide whether the listed fields are sufficient for a future theorem rule.
